name: Analytics DOM
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Analytics DOM is a library that allows automatic tracking of events and data collection on the page in the browser that is required by our machine learning platform. The API of the library is the same as "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://developers.findify.io/page/findify-analytics", "target": "_self", "children": [{"text": "Analytics"}]}, {"text": " - the only difference is that this library listens for "}, {"text": "document.ready", "code": true}, {"text": " state and collects data that exists on the current page.\n"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Tracking Events"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Event Data"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To collect and send data to our Feedback API automatically from the current page, you should add elements with corresponding "}, {"text": "data-findify-event", "code": true}, {"text": " attributes inside the "}, {"text": "", "code": true}, {"text": " section of the page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The attributes "}, {"text": "data-findify-[property-name]=[value]", "code": true}, {"text": " should be defined on the elements to collect proper data. The children elements with these attributes will be added to "}, {"text": "line_items", "code": true}, {"text": " array."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "HTML"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
", "code": true}]}], "lang": "applescript"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "...will be sent to the Feedback API as..."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSON"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{ \"purchase\": { \"currency\": \"EUR\", \"line_items\": [ {\"item_id\": \"PRODUCT_ID_1\", \"quantity\": \"1\", \"unit_price\": \"269\", \"variant_item_id\": \"VARIANT_ID_1\"}, {\"item_id\": \"PRODUCT_ID_2\", \"quantity\": \"1\", \"unit_price\": \"19\", \"variant_item_id\": \"VARIANT_ID_2\"} ], \"order_id\": \"ORDER_ID\", \"revenue\": \"288\" }}", "code": true}]}], "lang": "json"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Click Tracking"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To automatically track clicks on elements on the page you should use "}, {"text": "data-findify-track=[event-name]", "code": true}, {"text": " attribute and "}, {"text": "data-findify-*", "code": true}, {"text": " on the same element to send this data in the correct format."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JSON"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "
